skills.name: audit
skills.description: Audits an existing app, repository, document or plan and returns evidence-backed, severity-ordered findings.

skills.name: brainstorm
skills.description: Shapes an early idea into a testable direction by exposing assumptions, trade-offs and the smallest useful next step.

skills.name: debug
skills.description: Reproduces and isolates defects before applying a minimal fix with regression evidence.

skills.name: devil-review
skills.description: Challenges a proposed ship decision by attacking assumptions, proof quality and unresolved production risk.

skills.name: frontend
skills.description: Builds distinctive production interfaces with repository-native design, accessibility and browser verification.

skills.name: hardening-pass
skills.description: Runs a final pre-ship pass across validation, observability, recovery, documentation and operational guardrails.

skills.name: next-improvements
skills.description: Classifies useful follow-up work after delivery without hiding new scope inside the completed task.

skills.name: prompt-evaluation
skills.description: Creates deterministic prompt and agent evaluation suites with regression cases, rubric assertions and automated quality-gate output.

skills.name: public-context-pack-repos
skills.description: Creates source-backed public context repositories that teach a domain clearly to both people and software agents.

skills.name: quality-audit
skills.description: Reviews code, tests, architecture, performance, accessibility, security or production readiness through a focused lens.

skills.name: recheck
skills.description: Reopens a just-delivered result, tests the completion claim and repairs safe gaps before shipping.

skills.name: refactor
skills.description: Improves code structure through bounded impact analysis, behavior-preserving changes and proportional verification.

skills.name: repo-complete
skills.description: Assesses and improves public repository readiness across documentation, licensing, security, releases and privacy.

skills.name: tdd
skills.description: Applies a strict red-green-refactor cycle with behavior tests written before implementation.
